ddls:
CREATE TABLE "road_safety_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities */,
  "resident_population" REAL /* Resident population in thousands */,
  "fatality_rate_population" REAL /* Fatality rate per 100,000 population */,
  "licensed_drivers" INTEGER /* Number of licensed drivers in thousands */,
  "fatality_rate_drivers" REAL /* Fatality rate per 100,000 licensed drivers */,
  "registered_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of registered vehicles in thousands */,
  "fatality_rate_vehicles" REAL /* Fatality rate per 100,000 registered vehicles */,
  "vehicle_miles_traveled" REAL /* Vehicle miles traveled in billions */,
  "fatality_rate_vmt" REAL /* Fatality rate per 100 million vehicle miles traveled */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_safety_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_safety_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., fatalities, population) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., number, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES road_safety_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_metrics" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_types" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_formats" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
